title: Ticket to a Crime
writer: Carroll John Daly, John T. Neville, Charles Logue
actors: Ralph Graves, Lois Wilson, Lola Lane
plot: A Man is found murdered at the Lido Country Club and, although several people are under suspicion, including Elaine and Willis Purdy, the police can not find the murderer; but private detective Clay Holt, and his pretty secretary ...
